"Pains always been the root of my music if I let it go will my whole career be in ruins? Then I remember why these fans look up to me, it's not cuz I'm a "Rap God" I don't need y'all to bow to me"
Jabbing back at Eminem for calling him a Recovery Clone
Outro is so good, same with Intro 2
Intro 3 is great too, showing NF overcoming Fear in representation of part of his OCD
Mansions amazing because he's taking you through a tour of his "mansion" which is his mind and all his struggles representing each room of the "mansion"
Hope is so raw and emotional it makes grown men cry
NF is one of the most meaningful artists out there
Not important to the industry, but he doesn't care, he cares for his meaning to his fans who he helped with suicide and other struggles through his songs
"these kids, they hit me up, say they cut they wrists on the daily, this music is more than you think, don't book me for just entertainment"
"Imagine someone looking up at you and saying your music's the reason they're alive"

Nyle Dylandy lived with his family in Ireland. There was a holy war going on, and his hometown was bombed, his entire family a victim to this, only him and his brother survived
He had nowhere to go and a unquenched vengeance
Won't be here today besides now.
So he had to become a Gundam Meister. A part of Celestial Being who was working to eradicate war. He piloted the GN-003 Gundam Dynames and he had a little robotic partner.

He encountered the man who ordered the bombing in an intervention and fought him with only one working eye, so his aim wasn't good, the man who ordered the bombing took advantage and blew up half of his Gundam with his Fangs

He survived but knew he had to kill the man. For the sake of his little brother. He told his robotic friend Haro to return to the main ship, with the Gundam, and Lockon set off to find the GN Arms to kill the man
Lockon Stratos Nyle Dylandy fired a massive beam at the man's Gundam, and the man shot back through the barrel of the GN Arms, Lockon floated there.
His final words were "are you people down there satisfied with how the world is? I hate it."

Haro returned to the ship, repeating "Lockon! lockon! Lockon!" To the ships pilots as they all slowly became aware that Lockon was killed, and they all slowly started sobbing as Haro kept repeating his friends name "Lockon! lockon! Lockon!"
